allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/areas.json'\); data.forEach\(a => console.log\(a.slug, 'faqs:', a.faq?.length || 0\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/services.json'\); d.forEach\(s => console.log\(s.slug, '|', s.title || s.name\)\)")
